refined_caption: The hospital bathroom appears to be unhygienic and dirty. A toilet is visible in the middle of the room.
complaint_description: I was shocked to see the state of the hospital bathroom, it was filthy and clearly hadn't been cleaned in a while. The toilet was right in the middle of the room and the whole area looked unhygienic. This is unacceptable for a healthcare facility.
voice_text: The bathroom in this hospital is disgusting, it's really dirty and the toilet is just sitting out in the open.
